events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario is about missing AFCI/GFCI where required in a commercial electrical project at rough-complete stage. This is a code compliance issue - NEC 210.8 (GFCI) and 210.12 (AFCI) require these devices in specific locations. Missing them is non-compliant and defective. Decision should be fail. Risk is high because missing GFCI/AFCI means no personnel protection from ground faults/arc faults.
